sections: By using {store_name}, you agree to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
{store_name} reserves the right to update these terms at any time without prior notice.
All product descriptions, images, and prices are subject to change without notice.
We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time.
By placing an order, you agree to provide accurate and complete information.
Payment must be received in full before orders are processed. We accept the payment methods displayed at checkout.
Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed. {store_name} is not liable for delays caused by third-party services.
Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery.
Returns are accepted within the period specified in our return policy. Items must be in original condition.
Refunds will be processed using the original payment method within a reasonable timeframe.
{store_name} shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or services.
For questions about these terms, please contact us through the contact information provided on our website.
